name: Fondant with Pears or Cherries
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop unpeeled pears into bite-sized chunks. Or pit cherries and cut in half.
2. Arrange the fruit on the bottom of a greased tart pan.
3. To make the pastry, mix all ingredients except softened butter with a beater.
4. When well-blended, add butter.
5. Pour batter over the fruit.
6. Bake in a 300°F oven for 30 minutes.
